category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Qatar.

title.en: China-to-Mauritania EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入毛里塔尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入茅利塔尼亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Mauritania DNPQ standards practice, ARE electricity-sector oversight, SOMELEC grid-connection context, 220/380 V 50 Hz supply, IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 / IEC 61000 technical expectations, Sahara heat and dust constraints, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 differences.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与毛里塔尼亚DNPQ标准实践、ARE电力行业监管、SOMELEC并网背景、220/380 V 50 Hz供电、IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 / IEC 61000技术预期、撒哈拉高温粉尘约束，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930差异的对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與茅利塔尼亞DNPQ標準實務、ARE電力行業監管、SOMELEC併網背景、220/380 V 50 Hz供電、IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 / IEC 61000技術預期、撒哈拉高溫粉塵約束，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930差異的對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Mauritania, the confirmed practical gap is not a mature public EVSE certification pathway; it is a layered project-risk problem. Exporters should verify the current DNPQ standards and conformity route, coordinate grid connection and operation with ARE and SOMELEC, map China GB/T 18487 evidence to IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23, redesign GB/T 20234 connectors to IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 where IEC-aligned vehicles or tenders are expected, and derate electronics for Sahara heat, dust, weak-grid voltage variation, and low-electrification operating conditions. Mauritania's EV market appears extremely early-stage; broad public charging deployment should not be assumed without project-specific demand, grid capacity, and operating support.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入毛里塔尼亚时，已确认的实务差距不是成熟公开的EVSE认证路径，而是分层的项目风险问题。出口商应核实现行DNPQ标准和合格评定路径，与ARE和SOMELEC协调并网及运营，将中国GB/T 18487证据映射至IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23，在IEC体系车辆或招标预期存在时将GB/T 20234接口重新设计为IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2，并针对撒哈拉高温、粉尘、弱电网电压波动和低电气化运行条件进行降额。毛里塔尼亚电动汽车市场显然仍处于极早期；若无项目级需求、电网容量和运维支持，不应假定可广泛部署公共充电。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入茅利塔尼亞時，已確認的實務差距不是成熟公開的EVSE認證路徑，而是分層的項目風險問題。出口商應核驗現行DNPQ標準和合格評定路徑，與ARE和SOMELEC協調併網及營運，將中國GB/T 18487證據映射至IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23，在IEC體系車輛或招標預期存在時將GB/T 20234接口重新設計為IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2，並針對撒哈拉高溫、粉塵、弱電網電壓波動和低電氣化運行條件進行降額。茅利塔尼亞電動汽車市場顯然仍處於極早期；若無項目級需求、電網容量和運維支持，不應假定可廣泛部署公共充電。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, DNPQ scope determination, ARE approval, SOMELEC grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, tender compliance decision, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Mauritania standards, electricity-sector rules, SOMELEC technical requirements, IEC standard editions, customs treatment, and project-specific installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、DNPQ适用范围裁定、ARE批准、SOMELEC并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定、招标合规决定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行毛里塔尼亚标准、电力行业规则、SOMELEC技术要求、IEC标准版本、海关处理及项目专属安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、DNPQ適用範圍裁定、ARE批准、SOMELEC併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定、招標合規決定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行茅利塔尼亞標準、電力行業規則、SOMELEC技術要求、IEC標準版本、海關處理及項目專屬安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
